name: USS Mallard (ASR 4)
events: 28 May 1944 USS Hardhead (T/Cdr. F. McMaster, USN) conducted exercises in Panama Bay with USS Mallard (T/Lt. M.V. Evans, USN).
29 May 1944 USS Hardhead (T/Cdr. F. McMaster, USN) conducted exercises in Panama Bay with USS Mallard (T/Lt. M.V. Evans, USN).
30 May 1944 USS Hardhead (T/Cdr. F. McMaster, USN) conducted exercises in Panama Bay with USS Mallard (T/Lt. M.V. Evans, USN).
31 May 1944 USS Hardhead (T/Cdr. F. McMaster, USN) conducted exercises in Panama Bay with USS Mallard (T/Lt. M.V. Evans, USN).
1 Jun 1944 USS Hardhead (T/Cdr. F. McMaster, USN) conducted exercises in Panama Bay with USS Mallard (T/Lt. M.V. Evans, USN).
2 Jun 1944 USS Hardhead (T/Cdr. F. McMaster, USN) conducted exercises in Panama Bay with USS Mallard (T/Lt. M.V. Evans, USN).
3 Jun 1944 USS Hardhead (T/Cdr. F. McMaster, USN) conducted exercises in Panama Bay with USS Mallard (T/Lt. M.V. Evans, USN).
4 Jun 1944 USS Hardhead (T/Cdr. F. McMaster, USN) conducted exercises in Panama Bay with USS Mallard (T/Lt. M.V. Evans, USN). Later USS John D. Edwards (Lt. R.A. Norelius, USNR) also joined.
23 Jun 1944 USS Hawkbill (T/Cdr. F.W. Scanland, Jr., USN) conducted exercises in Panama Bay with USS Mallard (T/Lt. M.V. Evans, USN).
24 Jun 1944 USS Hawkbill (T/Cdr. F.W. Scanland, Jr., USN) conducted exercises in Panama Bay with USS Mallard (T/Lt. M.V. Evans, USN).
25 Jun 1944 USS Hawkbill (T/Cdr. F.W. Scanland, Jr., USN) conducted exercises in Panama Bay with USS Mallard (T/Lt. M.V. Evans, USN).
26 Jun 1944 USS Hawkbill (T/Cdr. F.W. Scanland, Jr., USN) conducted exercises in Panama Bay with USS Mallard (T/Lt. M.V. Evans, USN).
27 Jun 1944 USS Hawkbill (T/Cdr. F.W. Scanland, Jr., USN) conducted exercises in Panama Bay with USS Mallard (T/Lt. M.V. Evans, USN).
28 Jun 1944 USS Hawkbill (T/Cdr. F.W. Scanland, Jr., USN) conducted exercises in Panama Bay with USS Mallard (T/Lt. M.V. Evans, USN).
1 Jul 1944 USS Hawkbill (T/Cdr. F.W. Scanland, Jr., USN) conducted exercises in Panama Bay with USS John D. Edwards (Lt. R.A. Norelius, USNR) and USS Mallard (T/Lt. M.V. Evans, USN).
2 Jul 1944 USS Hawkbill (T/Cdr. F.W. Scanland, Jr., USN) conducted exercises in Panama Bay with USS John D. Edwards (Lt. R.A. Norelius, USNR) and USS Mallard (T/Lt. M.V. Evans, USN).
3 Jul 1944 USS Hawkbill (T/Cdr. F.W. Scanland, Jr., USN) conducted exercises in Panama Bay with USS John D. Edwards (Lt. R.A. Norelius, USNR) and USS Mallard (T/Lt. M.V. Evans, USN).

4 Jul 1944 USS Hawkbill (T/Cdr. F.W. Scanland, Jr., USN) conducted exercises in Panama Bay with USS John D. Edwards (Lt. R.A. Norelius, USNR), USS Mallard (T/Lt. M.V. Evans, USN) and USS SC-635 (Lt.(jg) H. Yaskin, USNR) and USS SC-657 (Lt.(jg) C.C. Peters, Jr., USNR).
17 Jul 1944 USS Icefish (T/Cdr. R.W. Peterson, USN) conducted exercises in Panama Bay with USS Mallard (?).
18 Jul 1944 USS Icefish (T/Cdr. R.W. Peterson, USN) conducted exercises in Panama Bay with USS Mallard (?).
19 Jul 1944 USS Icefish (T/Cdr. R.W. Peterson, USN) conducted exercises in Panama Bay with USS Mallard (?).
20 Jul 1944 USS Icefish (T/Cdr. R.W. Peterson, USN) conducted exercises in Panama Bay with USS Mallard (?).
21 Jul 1944 USS Icefish (T/Cdr. R.W. Peterson, USN) conducted exercises in Panama Bay with USS Mallard (?).
22 Jul 1944 USS Icefish (T/Cdr. R.W. Peterson, USN) conducted exercises in Panama Bay with USS Mallard (?).
23 Jul 1944 USS Icefish (T/Cdr. R.W. Peterson, USN) conducted exercises in Panama Bay with USS John D. Edwards (Lt. R.A. Norelius, USNR) and USS Mallard (?).
16 Aug 1944 USS Jallao (T/Cdr. J.B. Icenhower, USN) conducted exercises in the Gulf of Panama with USS Mallard (T/Lt. B.L. Maddox, USN).
Apparently also an exercise (possibly a practice attack) was carried out with (/ on) USS Detroit (T/Capt. D.C., Jr., USN).
17 Aug 1944 USS Jallao (T/Cdr. J.B. Icenhower, USN) conducted exercises in the Gulf of Panama with USS Mallard (T/Lt. B.L. Maddox, USN).
18 Aug 1944 USS Jallao (T/Cdr. J.B. Icenhower, USN) conducted exercises in the Gulf of Panama with USS Mallard (T/Lt. B.L. Maddox, USN).
19 Aug 1944 USS Jallao (T/Cdr. J.B. Icenhower, USN) conducted exercises in the Gulf of Panama with USS Mallard (T/Lt. B.L. Maddox, USN).

20 Aug 1944 USS Jallao (T/Cdr. J.B. Icenhower, USN) conducted exercises in the Gulf of Panama with USS Mallard (T/Lt. B.L. Maddox, USN). USS Mallard was however soon replaced by USS John D. Edwards (Lt. R.A. Norelius, USNR).
26 Aug 1944 USS Jallao (T/Cdr. J.B. Icenhower, USN) conducted exercises in the Gulf of Panama with USS John D. Edwards (Lt. R.A. Norelius, USNR) and USS Mallard (T/Lt. B.L. Maddox, USN).
27 Aug 1944 USS Jallao (T/Cdr. J.B. Icenhower, USN) conducted exercises in the Gulf of Panama with USS John D. Edwards (Lt. R.A. Norelius, USNR) and USS Mallard (T/Lt. B.L. Maddox, USN).

28 Aug 1944 USS Jallao (T/Cdr. J.B. Icenhower, USN) conducted exercises in the Gulf of Panama with USS John D. Edwards (Lt. R.A. Norelius, USNR), USS Mallard (T/Lt. B.L. Maddox, USN), USS SC-654 (Lt.(jg) R. Engelman, USNR) and USS SC-661 (Lt.(jg). R.D. Holsclaw, USNR).
10 Sep 1944 USS Kete (T/Cdr. R.L. Rutter, USN) conducted exercises in the Gulf of Panama with USS Mallard (T/Lt. B.L. Maddox, USN). (1)
11 Sep 1944 USS Kete (T/Cdr. R.L. Rutter, USN) conducted exercises in the Gulf of Panama with USS Mallard (T/Lt. B.L. Maddox, USN). (1)
12 Sep 1944 USS Kete (T/Cdr. R.L. Rutter, USN) conducted exercises in the Gulf of Panama with USS Mallard (T/Lt. B.L. Maddox, USN). (1)
13 Sep 1944 USS Kete (T/Cdr. R.L. Rutter, USN) conducted exercises in the Gulf of Panama with USS Mallard (T/Lt. B.L. Maddox, USN). (1)

19 Sep 1944 USS Dragonet (T/Cdr. J.H. Lewis, USN) and USS Kete (T/Cdr. R.L. Rutter, USN) conducted exercises in the Gulf of Panama with USS Alden (T/Lt.Cdr. W. Herkness, 2nd, USN), USS Mallard (T/Lt. B.L. Maddox, USN), USS SC-713 (Lt.(jg) E.J. Spitz, USNR) and USS SC-986 (Lt.(jg) O.W. Scott, USNR). (2)
20 Sep 1944 USS Kete (T/Cdr. R.L. Rutter, USN) conducted exercises in the Gulf of Panama with USS Alden (T/Lt.Cdr. W. Herkness, 2nd, USN) and USS Mallard (T/Lt. B.L. Maddox, USN). (2)

21 Sep 1944 USS Kete (T/Cdr. R.L. Rutter, USN) conducted exercises in the Gulf of Panama with USS Alden (T/Lt.Cdr. W. Herkness, 2nd, USN), USS Mallard (T/Lt. B.L. Maddox, USN), USS SC-713 (Lt.(jg) E.J. Spitz, USNR) and USS SC-986 (Lt.(jg) O.W. Scott, USNR). (2)
18 Oct 1944 USS Kraken (T/Cdr. T.H. Henry, USN) conducted exercises in the Gulf of Panama with USS Alden (T/Lt.Cdr. W. Herkness, 2nd, USN) and USS Mallard (T/Lt. B.L. Maddox, USN). (3)

19 Oct 1944 USS Kraken (T/Cdr. T.H. Henry, USN) conducted exercises in the Gulf of Panama with USS Alden (T/Lt.Cdr. W. Herkness, 2nd, USN), USS Mallard (T/Lt. B.L. Maddox, USN), USS SC-541 (?) and USS SC-687 (Lt.(jg) T.L. Hickey, USNR). (3)

22 Oct 1944 USS Kraken (T/Cdr. T.H. Henry, USN) conducted exercises in the Gulf of Panama with USS Alden (T/Lt.Cdr. W. Herkness, 2nd, USN), USS Mallard (T/Lt. B.L. Maddox, USN), USS SC-541 (?) and USS SC-687 (Lt.(jg) T.L. Hickey, USNR). (3)
27 Oct 1944 USS Kraken (T/Cdr. T.H. Henry, USN) conducted exercises in the Gulf of Panama with USS Alden (T/Lt.Cdr. W. Herkness, 2nd, USN) and USS Mallard (T/Lt. B.L. Maddox, USN). (3)
